Present in court were: Terry Wilkens for Pltffs; Glenn Barger for Charles O. Jones Co., Inc. and Zoe Associates; Scott Brust for Mark's Furnace System and Driscoll Plumbing and Mary Acquesta for William Decker construction. Court orders as follows:
Denies the HOA's motion to reconsider the granting of the motion for summary judgment in favor of Jones and LLC; overturns the ruling of 5-27-08 and grants the HOA thirty days leave to amend to plead facts of substantial compliance and/or extrinsic mistake with respect to maintenance of the HOA's corporate status as it relates to Marks & Driscoll; sustains Marks & Driscoll's demurrer to the individual homeowner's amended complaint with 30 days leave to amend; denies the individual homeonwer's oral request for leave to amend to add parties in addition to Marks & Driscoll without prejudice to said plaintiffs filing a motion for leave to amend; and reaffirms paragraph 4 of the Court's order filed 10-3-08 allowing Jones and/or LLC to assert cross claims based on any amended complaint filed by the individual homeowners.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CHARLES O. JONES CO., INC. and ZOE ASSOCIATES LLC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. BY USING THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM WITH ONLY LIMITED ADDITIONS, PLAINTIFFS HAVE FAILED TO SET FORTH THE REQUISITE FACTS NECESSARY TO ESTABLISH THEIR RELATIONSHIP WITH DEFENDANTS AND THE BASIS FOR THEIR CLAIMS AGAINST THE DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS MUST ALLEGE WHEN THE CAUSES OF ACTION AROSE, THE FACTUAL BASIS FOR THE CAUSE OF ACTION AND IF BASED ON A WRITING, SUFFICIENT DETAIL TO ASCERTAIN THE TERMS OF THE WRITING. WITH RESPECT TO THE NEGLIGENCE PER SE CLAIMS, PLAINTIFFS MUST PROVIDE GREATER SPECIFICITY AS TO THE STATUTE(S) OR REGULATION(S) AT ISSUE. PLAINTIFFS ALSO MUST BE CLEAR AS TO HOW DEFENDANTS CONDUCT INJURED PLAINTIFFS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
